title: Survival Recrafted
description: Minecraft Vanilla is too easy, Survival Recrafted modpack changes that.
body:
# **Survival Recrafted - A complete, immersive survival overhaul**

**Survival Recrafted is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack designed to take the core survival experience and polish it to absolute perfection. Survival Recrafted completely overhauls the game with thirst mechanics, deadly temperatures, new mobs and an unforgiving early game.**

Even just surviving the first night is an actual achievement.

## **✨ Key Features**

-  High Performance: Optimized with the best Fabric performance mods to ensure high FPS
-  Overhauled Early Game: Forget punching trees. You will need to scavenge rocks, sticks and craft primitive flint tools just to get your first piece of wood.
-  Dynamic Difficulty: As you get stronger, so does the world. Mobs will scale in difficulty the further you travel and the longer you survive.
-  Visual Enhancements: Shaders for cinematic lighting and 3D Textures.
-  Vanilla Style: No complex tech or magic mods, just pure Minecraft survival, recrafted.

## **🌎 How to Survive & Objectives**

- How to get started: You can't chop down a tree with your bare fists anymore. You have to collect rocks, sticks and flint from the ground. Make a Crafting Rock, put it down and place the sticks and flint like in a crafting table, and then hit the Crafting Rock a few times with a rock to craft the tools. You can cut down trees only by using a Flint Axe. Many crafting recipes have been changed. Open your inventory, in the top left you will see a list of items that you have to craft, click on the item to see the crafting recipe.
- Thirst & Temperature: Hunger is no longer your only concern. You have to drink fresh water from a river, or purify it. Craft warm clothes to survive the snowy biomes, and stay cool in the scorching desert.
- Scaling Difficulty: As you progress, survive longer, and travel further, the world actively scales in difficulty. Mobs become stronger, deal more damage and spawn more.
- Objectives: Your main objective is to defeat the overhauled Ender Dragon. Open the Advancements tab, on the right side you will see some pinned advancements that you have to unlock in order to progress through the modpack.

## **⚙️ Technical Recommendations**

- RAM Allocation: You should allocate 6 GB to 8 GB of RAM for the smoothest experience.
- Mods: You can see all the mods installed in this modpack by checking the versions tab, select a version and all the mods installed are under the Dependencies list.
- Mod Settings: You can easily tweak this modpack in Mod Menu, almost every mod can be customized. If you don't like something you can turn the feature off or just remove that mod.
- Shaders: You can enable shaders in video settings! The modpack comes with Bliss, Cmplementary and BSL Shaders for cinematic lighting.

## **💬 Feedback & Bug Reports**

If you have suggestions, questions or need help feel free to write me. 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

> Contact me via Email: kozmin47nice@gmail.com

</details>



The foundation of this modpack has been thoroughly balanced and finalized. 
I plan to keep updating the modpack and adding mods or other assets in the future.
